items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Developer Relations Engineer to be our ambassador to the developer community. You will create technical content, build sample applications, speak at conferences, and engage with developers to drive awareness and adoption of our platform.

This role is part engineer, part educator, part community builder. You will spend your time writing code, creating tutorials, and talking to developers to understand their needs and help them succeed with our tools. If you love building things and teaching others, this role is for you.

Responsibilities

  • Create technical content including blog posts, video tutorials, sample projects, and documentation
  • Speak at conferences, meetups, and webinars to showcase our platform capabilities
  • Build and maintain demo applications and starter kits that help developers get started quickly
  • Engage with the developer community on GitHub, Discord, Stack Overflow, and social media
  • Gather developer feedback and advocate for developer experience improvements with Product and Engineering
  • Contribute to open-source projects and foster community contributions

Requirements

  • 5+ years of software development experience, with 2+ years in developer relations or advocacy
  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js
  • Experience creating technical content (writing, video, or live presentations)
  • Comfortable speaking in front of audiences at conferences and online events
  • Active presence in developer communities and genuine passion for helping developers

Nice to Have

  • Experience with CMS or content platform ecosystems
  • YouTube channel, popular blog, or significant open-source contributions
  • Experience with modern web frameworks (Astro, Next.js, Nuxt.js)
